/MTR-DA/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVK/CAL SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(H)//AJW/CH1 CJ 3Y/X UPPER TERM/X THE DEFENDANT SHALL ALSO SERVE THE FOLLOWINTERMS /X COUNT 2, 3 YEARS, CONCURRENT/X COUNT 3, 3 YEARS, CONCURRENT/XCOUNT 4, 3 YEARS, CONCURRENT/X TOTAL 3 YEARS/CTS 292/4019HALF/STATES/DNACOMP/VF5 200/X DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED PURSUANT TO PC1170(H),/CCC CASE #10032132 & #11021325/

/CAL:TO SET DA MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION, TRAILING #11021325/CONTD:SENTENCING/TWS/DOP/X:IT IS ANTICIPATED THAT THE DEFENDANT WILL BE SENTENCED TO 3YEARS IN STATE PRISON ON EACH COUNT (CONCURRENT ON ALL COUNTS AND ALSO CONCURRENT TO CASE #11021325 - FOR WHICH A CONSOLIDATED PSR HAS BEEN ORDERED FROM APD)/

/AJW/CH1 SP 3 Y U ESS PROB 3 Y PJ 1 Y/CTS  111/STATES/X AS TO COUNTS 2, 3AND 4, THE SENTENCE ON EACH COUNT IS 8 MONTHS STATE PRISON, WHICH IS ONE THIRD OF THE MIDTERM, EACH CONSECUTIVE TO COUNT 1, FOR A TOTAL OF 5 YEARS STATE PRISON, ESS, 3 YEARS ADULT PROBATION, WITH 1 YEAR IN THE COUNTY JAIL AND 111 DAYS CTS, THE COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE ON ALL COUNTSIS CONCURRENT/X:SENTENCE MAY BE SERVED IN  A DUAL DIAGNOSIS PROGRAM TO BE DETERMINED, A LIVE-INTREATMENT PROGRAM, COUNSEL WILL BRING A TRANSPORT ORDER FOR THE JUDGE'S SIGNATURE WHEN A PROGRAM IS FOUND/X:FAILURE TO COMPLETE THE PROGRAM MAY RESULT IN A LOSS OF CREDIT FOR TIME SPENT IN THE PROGRAM,/X:DEFENDANT'S RELEASE WILL BE ARRANGED THROUGH THE SHERIFF'S ALTERNATIVE PROGRAM DIVISION,/DNACOMP/WS/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE40/ICNA/ /COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/

/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 1,2,3,4/FNDG/CO:PLEA OPEN TO THE COURT/PRES:02-08-11/TWS/ARBUCKLE/ADPRS1:PURSUANT TO PC 667,5(B), PC 459-2ND DEGREE FELONY ON 05-16-96, PC 459-2ND DEGREE FELONY ON 08-07-96, PC 664-459-2ND DEGREE FELONY ON 09-02-88,PC 487(A) FELONY ON 05-19-99, PC 459-2ND DEGREE FELONY ON 09-01-05, HS 11350(A) FELONYON 07-17-92, PC 273,5(A) FELONY ON 02-12-92; THE LAST TWO ARE ALSO ADMITTED UNDER PC 1203(E)(4)/ /SAORD/SA2:2868 MISSION ST/SAORD3/
